response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 10+ years of engineering experience with at least 5 years in senior technical leadership, particularly in agentic AI systems or fintech infrastructure. While they have experience in distributed systems and event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Dunnhumby), their roles have primarily been in general software development, pricing automation, and GIS platforms rather than AI-native fintech systems. Their recent role at re:cinq mentions AI-agent infrastructure, but details are insufficient to validate production-scale agentic AI experience.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise (event streaming, microservices, Docker, Linux)
Experience with real-time systems and low-latency applications (Dunnhumby, GISCollective)
Demonstrated ability to build scalable platforms (GISCollective, WatchUp) and contribute to AI-agent tooling (MCP, frameworks)
concerns: No clear track record in agentic AI systems or fintech infrastructure (e.g., credit risk, working-capital management)
Limited experience in regulated or high-stakes commercial environments with financial consequences
No evidence of scaling engineering teams to 10+ people or leading executive-level technical governance

key_factors.factor: Senior technical leadership and team scaling
